out_of_scope: Application code (no changes to AiEng.Platform.App, Application, Domain, Providers.Abstractions, tests)

last_action.outcome: Backlog structure created with 5 epics, 14 features, 21 capabilities, 15 ideas. All derived from existing ADRs and ROADMAP.md; no architectural rule changed.

intended_next_action: Write docs/dashboard.md (Product Dashboard Definition) — the operational home page the application renders as its landing page in M2.
session_notes: The M0.5 refinement is an architecture-only change. The 10 required improvements are landing in this session: VISION.md, .ai/backlog/, structured state, decision log, capability mapping, dashboard definition, self-awareness state, dogfooding evolution, doc architecture validation, architecture review.
